extract: Eternatus (Japanese: ムゲンダイナ Mugendina) is a dual-type Poison/Dragon Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, the player battles a powered-up form of Eternatus, known as Eternamax Eternatus, in the climax of Pokémon Sword and Shield. Prior to Generation IX, this form could also briefly be seen when it uses its signature move, Eternabeam, but it cannot be acquired legitimately in-game. Eternatus is associated with the legendary heroes and was responsible for the Darkest Day. It is the last Pokémon in the Galar Pokédex.
